title: cyclosorus afrus
intro: Cyclosorus afrus, also known as the African maiden's hair fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Blechnaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and supporting the immune system. Cyclosorus afrus can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by steeping the dried leaves in hot water, or it can be used in combination with other herbs to create a medicinal tonic.
